# Growth Department Monthly Report — Tháng 04/2026

**Department:** Growth (Marketing + Sales)
**Period:** April 2026
**Generated by:** Analytics AI
**Date:** 2026-05-02
**Distribution:** Founder & CEO

---

## Executive Summary

Tháng 4 đánh dấu tháng vận hành full-capacity đầu tiên với toàn bộ AI Workers active. Kết quả positive trên hầu hết metrics, với revenue $4,200 vượt lower bound target ($3K). Department đang establish momentum cho Q2 growth.

**3 key highlights:**
1. Revenue đạt $4,200 (+23% vs March)
2. Content output 23 pieces (vượt target 20)
3. Pipeline $63,000 — healthy coverage cho May

**1 key concern:**
1. VinFood client health declining — cần retention action plan

### 3.4 Lost Deal Analysis
| Reason | Count | Prevention |
|--------|-------|------------|
| Budget mismatch | 2 | Better qualify budget early |
| Competitor price | 1 | Differentiate on value, not price |
| Build vs. buy decision | 1 | Show cost of building vs. buying |
| Lost contact | 1 | Tighter follow-up cadence |
| Too complex | 1 | Better scope definition upfront |

## 6. May 2026 Plan

### 6.1 Targets
| Metric | May Target | Basis |
|--------|-----------|-------|
| Revenue | $5,000-6,000 | Pipeline strength |
| New leads | 80-90 | Trending up |
| Content pieces | 22 | Calendar confirmed |
| New clients | 3-4 | Pipeline analysis |
| MRR end-of-month | $3,800-4,200 | Including closes |

### 6.2 Key Initiatives
1. **VinFood retention** — Execute retention plan, personal Founder engagement
2. **Deal size improvement** — Target mid-market ($2-3K) prospects specifically
3. **LinkedIn growth** — Increase to 4 posts/week, test video content
4. **Referral program launch** — Formalize with incentive structure
5. **SEO push** — 3 more keywords to top 10 (target: 15)

### 6.3 Risks
| Risk | Probability | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|------------|--------|------------|
| VinFood churn | 30% | Revenue -16% | Proactive retention |
| Deal pipeline slowdown | 20% | Revenue miss | Increase outbound |
| Facebook continues underperforming | 60% | Lead source loss | Shift budget to LinkedIn |
